text.message: I’ll trade u what u need
okay, lets be trading partners blue
Yeah that’s a crazy last spot to be available.
I accepted your trade then u raised it
Black I’m not going to trade u 2 for 1
u are not trading 1 for 1 either
I offered ore brick and wood one for one
you should always take the spot best for your game
don’t depend on trading from others that never works out
When I did u didn’t accept and green did
I’m genuinely trying to work with u
You have raised everytime i accept
I traded my one ore to green early when u didn’t sccept
I would have traded that lol
blue needs to be slowed down he is very much taking the lead
both of you are a threat but y are very close to a city
green can u trade the sheep for nb
sure, but i have lots of cards
I think yall are overestimating me
I traded like crazy for these settles I’m not that strong
And now a city and almost road
blue, i ll unblock u for a brick
Sleeping on black’s devs.  Giving him way too much ore.
Red you need to get some knights to protect this 6.  We’ve already lost so much.
So we agree greens the problem right?
yes but can we block his 4 wheat
u should have road, if green has it, we are in trouble
Black.  We need to try to help red settle 9/2 if possible.
i haven’t seen a single ore from the 6 all game
We need to move the knight and get red settled on that spot.  And then y’all will rob me and it’ll be balanced out.
Ugh.  See this is rough now.
Sorry red.  Really needed at least a card here.
But also chill on feeding black ore.
Blue is about as close to 8 as me.  And black is potentially around 9.
Maybe black but the solos on me are wild
And didn’t even produce ore.  You gave it all to him lol.
I blame this on the over focus on me
Before that lol.  How he got army and a VP.
